name: Peanut Butter Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. For the base: Combine graham cracker crumbs and sugar in a bowl. Mix melted butter-flavored Crisco with milk, then stir into the crumbs. Press into an 8 x 8 x 2-inch pan. Bake for 20-22 minutes.
3. For the filling: Beat cream cheese and peanut butter until well blended. Add sugar, milk, and egg; beat again. Stir in chopped peanuts if using. Spread over baked crust. Return to oven and bake for another 20-22 minutes, or until set.
4. For the drizzle: Melt chocolate chips and butter-flavored Crisco in a microwave on low heat. Drizzle over the top. Chill, then cut into 2 x 2-inch squares. Store in refrigerator.
